anatomy.description: Square wrapper with equal width and height. Uses rounded-full border-radius, rendering as a perfect circle at all sizes. Carries background fill and border.
A single centered icon. 20×20px confirmed for md. Communicates the action without a visible label.

variants.name: Default
variants.description: Main icon action. Dark fill. Equivalent to Primary in the labeled Button.

variants.name: Accent
variants.description: Highlighted icon action. Use only for specific, intentional moments.

variants.name: Secondary
variants.description: Supporting icon action. Use alongside Default when two relevant options exist.

variants.name: Outlined
variants.description: Bordered ghost icon action. Use for tertiary or utility actions.

variants.name: No-fill
variants.description: Ghost icon action. Use for low-emphasis actions in dense layouts.

variants.name: Destructive
variants.description: Danger icon action. Use only for irreversible operations. Always confirm.

figmaLayerNote: The Destructive type layer is named 'Ddestructive' in Figma (typo). Normalised to 'Destructive' in documentation.

states.name: Pressed
states.trigger: Button is actively clicked or tapped.

shape.note: Square container + rounded-full = perfect circle at all sizes.

accessibilityRequirements.ariaLabel: Required on every instance. The icon does not provide a visible label.
accessibilityRequirements.tooltip: Recommended for discoverability. Confirm with product/UX.
accessibilityRequirements.ariaHidden: The icon element should be aria-hidden when the button carries an aria-label.

notes: This component has no visible label. aria-label is mandatory on every instance.
Only use icons that are universally recognizable in their context.
